items.name: last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

descriptions.zh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要
descriptions.en: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.name: turbovec
items.description: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

descriptions.zh: 基于 TurboQuant 构建的向量索引，使用 Rust 编写并结合 Python 绑定
descriptions.en: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

items.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

items.name: Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

descriptions.zh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。
descriptions.en: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

items.name: Personal_AI_Infrastructure

descriptions.zh: 用于放大人类能力的代理人工智能基础设施。
descriptions.en: Agentic AI Infrastructure for magnifying HUMAN capabilities.
